questions.statement: Which one of the following words is similar in meaning to KINDLED
<div><strong>A diplomatic representative of the highest order sent by one country to another is called:</strong></div>

<p><strong>Choose the word that can substitute the given sentence.</strong></p>

<p>A poem of lamentation</p>

<p><strong>Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word.</strong></p>

<p>AMBIGUOUS</p>

<p>Select the word from the options which is similar in meaning to the bracketed part given in the sentence below.</p>

<p>I suppose I was looking for (a work that would give me income) and that was going to be an adventure.</p>

<p><strong>Select the option that can be used as a one-word substitute for the given group of words.</strong></p>

<p>Happening repeatedly</p>

<p style=""><span style="font-weight: 700;">Select the most appropriate meaning of the given idiom.</span></p>

<p style="">At somebody&#39;s expense&nbsp;</p>
options: Something that is done very quickly&nbsp; /
<span style="">To live in a luxurious or costly way</span> /

questions.statement:

<p>At one&rsquo;s wit&#39;s end</p>

options: Impossible to return to an earlier state&nbsp; /

questions.statement:

Select the option that is&nbsp;<span style="font-weight: 700;">opposite in meaning</span>&nbsp;to the underlined word/words and mark your response in your Answer Sheet accordingly.</strong></p>

<p>The student made a <u>generous</u> contribution to the flood relief fund.</p>

<p>Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word.</p>

<p>One should not worry too much about <u>trivial</u> matters in routine.</p>

Select the option that is nearest in meaning to the underlined word and mark your response on the answer sheet accordingly.</span></p>

options: <span id="docs-internal-guid-00ee319e-7fff-e00a-8312-e396dd8c7254"><span style="  background-color: transparent; font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-variant-position: normal; vertical-align: baseline; white-space-collapse: preserve;">Hesitant</span></span> /

questions.statement:
<p>Select the most appropriate synonym of the given word.</p>

<p>Imbue</p>

<p><span style="font-weight: 700; ">Fill in the blank with the help of idioms/phrases out of the given options.</span></p>

<p>The Chancellor is ____________ with the Prime Minister over public spending.</p>

<p><span style="font-weight: 700;">Direction - In the following question, out of the four alternatives, the descriptive sentence is aptly described by just one word. Select the choice which gives the meaning most appropriately.</span></p>

<p>One who draws maps</p>

<p>Property that descends to an heir.</p>

<p>On the cards</p>

<p>Select the most appropriate meaning of the given idiom.</p>

<p>Get into a scrape&nbsp;</p>

<p>At daggers drawn with</p>
options: To be bitterly hostile towards each other /
To help someone in time of need /
